name: Waterloo 2pk Mesh and Aluminum Table Chaise Lounge - Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description: This outdoor rust-proof aluminum framed Christopher Knight Home Waterloo 2Pk Mesh and Aluminum Table Chaise Lounge is a wonderful addition to any patio or back yard. Featuring a mesh seating area perfect for the outdoor environment, this lounge is both stylish and comfortable. This lounge also comes complete with an additional side table ideal for placing your drink down while enjoying the afternoon. This Christopher Knight Home Waterloo Mesh and Aluminum Table Chaise Lounge is ideal for those warm summer days when the only activities on your schedule include relaxing and napping in the summer sun.
